ddl:
CREATE TABLE customer (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    customer_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    full_name TEXT,
    date_of_birth TEXT,
    nationality_id INTEGER,
    occupation_id INTEGER,
    risk_level_id INTEGER,
    account_open_date TEXT,
    kyc_status_id INTEGER,
    pep_status INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    address TEXT,
    phone_number TEXT,
    email TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (nationality_id) REFERENCES country(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (occupation_id) REFERENCES occupation(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (risk_level_id) REFERENCES risk_level(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (kyc_status_id) REFERENCES kyc_status(id)
)

ddl:
CREATE TABLE aml_transaction (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    transaction_type_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    amount REAL NOT NULL,
    currency_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    transaction_date TEXT NOT NULL,
    counterparty_name TEXT,
    counterparty_country_id INTEGER,
    transaction_channel_id INTEGER,
    suspicious_flag INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    alert_id INTEGER,
    description TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customer(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (transaction_type_id) REFERENCES transaction_type(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (currency_id) REFERENCES currency(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (counterparty_country_id) REFERENCES country(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (transaction_channel_id) REFERENCES transaction_channel(id)
)

ddl:
CREATE TABLE alert (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    transaction_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    alert_type_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    risk_score INTEGER,
    alert_date TEXT NOT NULL,
    alert_status_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    assigned_to TEXT,
    investigation_notes TEXT,
    resolution_date TEXT,
    sar_filed INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    FOREIGN KEY (transaction_id) REFERENCES aml_transaction(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (alert_type_id) REFERENCES alert_type(id),
    FOREIGN KEY (alert_status_id) REFERENCES alert_status(id)
)
